Scenario S1: Find EPMS course/module information

Quick steps:
1) Open the UoB intranet in another tab.
2) Try to find a course/module page (EPMS).
3) Test at 200% zoom. Check if menus and text still work.
4) Try keyboard-only (Tab/Enter). Can you reach everything?
5) If anything blocks you, click “Report issue” and log it.

When you find a barrier, click “Report issue” and describe what happened + what you expected.
